project: Corvus Star - Swarm Native Threads Integration
philosophy: Context Decoupling via the Architect. The Hall is the Arbiter of Truth (Static Schema), Episodic Memory is the Narrative Truth (Task Context).

beads.title: Phase 1: Upgrading the Hall (Arbiter of Truth)
beads.description: REOPENED IMPLEMENTATION GAP: the design is settled, but the runtime code has not landed it yet. 1) Update `hall_files` to include `exports_json` and `imports_json`. 2) Add `hall_episodic_memory` (memory_id, bead_id, repo_id, tactical_summary, metadata_json, timestamps). 3) Upgrade PennyOne scanning to persist exports/imports into `hall_files`. 4) Update TypeScript Hall contracts to expose the new columns and episodic-memory records.

beads.title: Phase 2: The Context Compressor (Flash-Lite)
beads.description: Create a new weave adapter `weave:compress`. This weave uses the ONE MIND delegation pattern with a strict `Model Hint: gemini-2.5-flash-lite`. It takes a completed bead's generated code/diff and outputs a highly compressed tactical summary of *only* what succeeded, ignoring failed tool calls. This summary is saved to `hall_episodic_memory`.

beads.title: Phase 3: The Thread DSL & Execution Graph
beads.description: Upgrade the Architect Agent (`architect.ts`). Instead of a linear array, the Architect must output a Dependency Graph (e.g., Bead 3 depends on Bead 1). Update `HallBeadRecord` to include a `depends_on` array. The Architect uses the global PennyOne Matrix to map these dependencies but shields the workers from the global map.

beads.title: Phase 4: Parallel Thread Orchestrator
beads.description: Overhaul the `FORGE_EXECUTION` block in `chant.ts`. Implement an asynchronous thread manager that reads the Bead Dependency Graph. It must dispatch `weave:evolve` for multiple beads simultaneously if they have no unmet dependencies, acting as the 'Main Thread' scheduler.

beads.title: Phase 5: Sub-Thread RAM & Focused Context
beads.description: Modify the `evolve.ts` payload. When a Sub-Thread boots up, the Architect constructs a focused 'RAM' packet containing ONLY: 1) Tactical instructions, 2) Compressed Episodic Memories of direct dependencies, and 3) Specific file paths from the Hall that are relevant. Do NOT pass the global project schema to the Sub-Thread.
